# Fixture for elot/ontology-declaration-heading checker.
# The ontology-declaration heading has a malformed parenthesised
# identifier (space instead of colon in the version IRI), which would
# cause the tangler to silently omit the Ontology: block.

#+title: Broken Ontology Declaration
#+author: ELOT test suite

* my-ont
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: my-ont
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./my-ont.omn :noweb yes
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

#+name: prefix-table
| prefix | uri                    |
|--------+------------------------|
| ex:    | http://example.org/    |
| exo:   | http://example.org/ont/|

** my-ont ontology (exo:my-ont exo my-ont/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - rdfs:comment :: example
